disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Sudden violent coughing fit with a brief blue discolouration of the face, occurring during a meal of modified (pureed) food
trigger_question_examples: Did his colour change while he was coughing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He was having his pureed dinner when he suddenly started coughing really hard, and his face went blue for a bit. The coughing went on for about five minutes.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Persisting wet/congested-sounding cough and rapid breathing with visible distress after the acute coughing settled
trigger_question_examples: What does his cough sound like?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He's breathing fast and he sounds really wet and congested now, and he still looks distressed and anxious.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Long-standing swallowing difficulty managed with a modified pureed diet, thickened fluids and one-to-one assisted feeding
trigger_question_examples: Does he have any trouble with swallowing normally?
What sort of diet is he on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, he's had swallowing problems for a long time — he's on pureed food and thickened drinks and we always feed him one-to-one.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Prior major stroke two years ago with residual right-sided weakness and speech difficulty, reported by staff as unchanged from his usual baseline tonight
trigger_question_examples: Is his weakness or speech any different from normal tonight?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: He had a big stroke a couple of years ago and he's got permanent right-sided weakness and trouble talking — but that's all the same as usual, it's not any different tonight.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: His mouth was cleared, no visible food is obstructing, and he can still make (garbled) sounds and cough
trigger_question_examples: Can he still make sounds or cough?
Is there any food you can see stuck in his mouth?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: We cleared his mouth and there's nothing stuck that we can see. He's still coughing and making noises, just his usual garbled ones.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No fever at present and no shivering; temperature reads normal on the facility thermometer
trigger_question_examples: Has he got a temperature or any shivering?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No fever right now — the thermometer says 37.1 and he's not shivering.
